productDisplayName: Status Quo Men Stripes Maroon Tshirts
description: Composition Polo neck T-shirt made of maroon and white panels composed of 100% cotton, has a wide spread collar with tape detailing on the inseam, long sleeves, buttoned chest placket, embroidered brand detailing on the upper left chest, appliqued numbering on the right sleeve and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in warm water using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Wide white and maroon panels and long sleeves lend a preppy feel to this polo neck T-shirt from status quo. The embroidered brand detailing on the upper left chest enhances the brand image, while the appliqued numbering on the right sleeve gives it a sporty vibe. Crafted from 100% cotton, the fabric offers exemplary comfort. Team this with jeans or chinos. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 6', Shoulders: 19"
